name: Chocolate Angel Cake
recipeIngredient: raspberries and nectarine slices -- for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1 Preheat oven to 350°F. In a medium bowl, combine cocoa and hot water.
Mix well; cool. In a small bowl, combine 3/4 cup sugar, flour, and salt.
Mix well; set aside.
2 In a large mixing bowl, using an electric mixer on high speed, beat egg whites until foamy. Add cream of tartar; continue beating until soft peaks form. Gradually add remaining sugar; beat until stiff peaks form.
3 Sift half of the flour mixture over the egg white mixture; fold gently until combined. Repeat with the remaining flour mixture. Stir 1 cup of egg white mixture into cocoa mixture. Gently but thoroughly fold cocoa mixture into the remaining egg white mixture until combined.
4 Spoon the batter into an ungreased 10-inch tube pan. Run a small knife through the batter to remove air pockets. Bake until springy to the touch and a toothpick inserted near the center comes out clean, about 50 minutes.
5 Invert the pan and place the center tube over the neck of a bottle. Cool completely. Using a knife, loosen cake edges. Invert the cake onto a serving plate; garnish with raspberries and nectarine slices.
